narrative_votes_with_evidence.evidence_quote: lets get on with a full nuke war…wipe us all out …at least it (for most) will be over quickly
narrative_votes_with_evidence.reasoning: This statement explicitly invokes the fear of nuclear annihilation, presenting it as a seemingly preferable outcome to the current situation, which serves to amplify anxieties about catastrophic war.

narrative_votes_with_evidence.evidence_quote: Sadly the western media is framing the war as if Russia is losing which only prolongs negotiations and causes more death.
narrative_votes_with_evidence.reasoning: This quote directly accuses Western media of misrepresenting the war's progress ('framing'), implying their reporting is deceptive propaganda that has harmful real-world consequences, fostering distrust.

narrative_votes_with_evidence.evidence_quote: for the west it’s always been the soviet (RUSSIAN) that has ALWAYS been the boogie man..when in fact they were SELDOM a threat.. amerika always blew any comment about RUSSIA ... way out of proportion
narrative_votes_with_evidence.reasoning: This statement portrays Russia as being unfairly and consistently demonized ('boogie man') by the West despite posing little threat, framing Russia as a victim of Western exaggeration and hostility.
